title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents don't work reliably because the industry has normalized failure. Even at 90% accuracy per step, errors compound across multi-step workflows causing system-wide failure. He contends that shipping reliable agents requires prioritizing reliability and developing taste through practices like weekly dogfooding.
